404: Siden ble ikke funnet | SpareBank 1

https://www.sparebank1.no/nb/bank/privat/404.html
Avvik: 196 | Bestått: 275
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (17 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" class="responsive" fetchpriority="high" height="437.0" src="/content/dam/SB1/illustrasjoner/staende/dame-pc-stressa.png" width="498.0"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="ffe-body-text"> <script> window.SB1 = { config: { app: { logServlet: '/bin/logservlet', param1: "", param2: "all",
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 style="text-align: center;">Oisann!</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

SERIOUS

404: Siden ble ikke funnet | SpareBank 1 Ringerike Hadeland

https://www.sparebank1.no/nb/ringerike-hadeland/privat/404.html
Avvik: 57 | Bestått: 115
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (10 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" class="responsive" fetchpriority="high" height="437.0" src="/content/dam/SB1/illustrasjoner/staende/dame-pc-stressa.png" width="498.0"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" class="inline-svg responsive" data-lazy-breakpoint="768px" data-lazy-largesrc="/content/dam/SB1/ikoner/SoMe/blogg-hvit.svg" data-lazy-smallsrc="/content/dam/SB1/ikoner/SoMe/blo
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="ffe-body-text"> <script> window.SB1 = { config: { app: { logServlet: '/bin/logservlet', param1: "", param2: "all",
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 style="text-align: center;">Oisann!</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content

MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 style="text-align: center;">Oisann!</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>

Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="primary-btn ffe-button ffe-button--primary id-1953274247" href="https://developer.sparebank1.no" onclick="" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="ffe-button__label">Get access
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel1" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-call-template" id="contact-tab1" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/"> <div class="icon-circl
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel2" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-appointment-template" id="contact-tab2" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/" id="meeting"> <d

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

SVG is missing accessible name

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table border="1" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="0" width="100%"> <tbody><tr><th valign="top">Navn på selskapet</th> <td><b>SpareBank 1 Gruppen AS</b></td> <td><b>SpareBank 1 Utvikling DA</b></td> </tr>
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th valign="top">Navn på selskapet</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th valign="top">Besøksadresse</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th valign="top">Postadresse</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th valign="top">Foretaksadresse</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th valign="top">Organisasjonsnummer</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th valign="top">Tillatelse</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th valign="top">Adresse til Finansdepartementet</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel1" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-call-template" id="contact-tab1" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/"> <div class="icon-circl
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

SERIOUS

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til bedrift'

<a href="bedrift.html">Gå til bedrift</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="background mod-image campaign-bg__img campaign-img--track" href="/nb/bank/om-oss/hjemme.html?icid=forside;;posisjonbm;;hovedbanner;;hjemme;;privat"> <div class="image-wrapper"> <picture> <so
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel1" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-call-template" id="contact-tab1" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/"> <div class="icon-circl
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<svg class="ffe-button__icon" focusable="false" height="150" viewbox="0 0 200 200" width="150" x="1200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="1200"><path d="M18.77 0c-3.562 0-7.125 1.347-9.834 4.044L4
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '-bankchoice' appears 2 times

id="-bankchoice"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'sparekalkulator' appears 2 times

id="sparekalkulator"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel1" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-call-template" id="contact-tab1" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/"> <div class="icon-circl
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel2" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-appointment-template" id="contact-tab2" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/" id="meeting"> <d
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel3" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-message-template" id="contact-tab3" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/" id="message"> <div c
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel4" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="find-us-template" id="contact-tab4" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/"> <div class="icon-circle"> <
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel5" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-chat-template" id="contact-tab5" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/" id="contact-chat"> <div

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.lofavor.no/student-og-laerlingforsikring" target="_blank">LOfavør Studentpakke</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a class="primary-btn ffe-button ffe-button--primary id-99848094" href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice/forsikring.html" onclick="" rel=""> <span class="ffe-button__label">Gå til kundeservice
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (111 characters)

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice/forsikring/avtalegiro-efaktura.html">Jeg har opprettet elektronisk betalingsavtale (AvtaleGiro og/eller eFaktura), men mottar likevel giro i posten?</a>
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'progressive_disclosu' appears 12 times

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '-bankchoice' appears 8 times

id="-bankchoice"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '1362716520-bankchoice' appears 2 times

id="1362716520-bankchoice"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '-bankchoice' appears 2 times

id="-bankchoice"
Each ID must be unique on the page

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

LOfavør fordeler | Se hvor mye du kan spare | SpareBank 1

https://www.sparebank1.no/nb/bank/privat/lofavor.html
Avvik: 210 | Bestått: 390
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (20 avvik)

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="ffe-h5 ffe-text-link card__title card-wrap--boxlink" href="https://www.eiendomsmegler1.no/selge/lo-favor?cid=partner;;sb1;;em1felles_bank;;lo-favor;;medlemsfordel-em1" target="_blank">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nav.no/no/bedrift/oppfolging/permittering-og-omstilling/lonnsgarantiordningen2" target="_blank">NAVs lønnsgarantiordning</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.lofavor.no/forsikring/student--og-l%C3%A6rlingforsikring" target="_blank">LOfavør Student- og lærlingforsikring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/bank/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Avvik: 47 | Bestått: 101
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (8 avvik)

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" class="responsive" fetchpriority="high" height="437.0" src="/content/dam/SB1/illustrasjoner/staende/dame-pc-stressa.png" width="498.0"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 style="text-align: center;">Oisann!</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

Page is missing h1 heading

Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content

<svg class="ffe-inline-button__icon ffe-inline-button__icon--right" style="margin-left: 5px; transform: none;" viewbox="0 0 200 200"><path d="m16.171492,41.999998c-4.143269,0-8.2852797,1.57464-11.4277
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="ffe-button__icon" focusable="false" height="150" viewbox="0 0 200 200" width="150" x="1200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" y="1200"><path d="M18.77 0c-3.562 0-7.125 1.347-9.834 4.044L4
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://bankid.no/feilmeldinger" target="_blank">bankid.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="contact-bankpicker__input ffe-input-field ffe-input-field--inline" maxlength="4" name="postalcode" placeholder="Postnummer" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '-bankchoice' appears 3 times

id="-bankchoice"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (171 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel1" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-call-template" id="contact-tab1" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/"> <div class="icon-circl
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel2" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-appointment-template" id="contact-tab2" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/" id="meeting"> <d
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel3" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-message-template" id="contact-tab3" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/" id="message"> <div c
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel4" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="find-us-template" id="contact-tab4" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/"> <div class="icon-circle"> <
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<li aria-controls="panel5" class="customer-action__list-item" data-menu-section="contact-chat-template" id="contact-tab5" role="tab"> <a class="cs-action tab-section" href="#/" id="contact-chat"> <div
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'bank-choice__modal-description_kundeservice-chat'

<div aria-labelledby="bank-choice__modal-description_kundeservice-chat" class="component-root" data-bank-overlay="true" data-button-id="kundeservice-chat" data-chat-error="Chatten er dessverre ikke ti
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="ffe-body-text"> <script> window.SB1 = { config: { app: { logServlet: '/bin/logservlet', param1: "", param2: "all",
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 style="text-align: center;">Oisann!</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/nb/hallingdal/privat.html"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 769px)" srcset="/content/dam/SB1/bank/hallingdal-valdres/foto/logo/skjerm/SB1_Halling_Valdr_verti_pos.png"/> <source media="(
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/hallingdal/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="ffe-dropdown" name="Contact name for appointment day"> <option disabled="" selected="" value="">Velg dag</option> <option value="Mandag">Mandag</option> <option value="Tirsdag">Tirsdag<
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="ffe-dropdown" name="Velg tidsrom "> <option disabled="" selected="" value="">Velg tid</option> <option class="bank-opentimes__opentime"></option> <option class="bank-opentimes__opentime
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="ffe-textarea input-message" name="Fortell oss hva du ønsker å snakke om"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Navn" required="true" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Bedriftens navn" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Epost" required="true" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Telefonnummer" required="true" type="tel"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'contact name for appointment day' missing autocomplete attribute

<select class="ffe-dropdown" name="Contact name for appointment day"> <option disabled="" selected="" value="">Velg dag</option> <option value="Mandag">Mandag</option> <option value="Tirsdag">Tirsdag<
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'fortell oss hva du ønsker å snakke om' missing autocomplete attribute

<textarea class="ffe-textarea input-message" name="Fortell oss hva du ønsker å snakke om"></textarea>
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="ffe-body-text"> <script> window.SB1 = { config: { app: { logServlet: '/bin/logservlet', param1: "", param2: "all",
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 style="text-align: center;">Oisann!</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/gudbrandsdal/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

python checker.py https://sparebank1.no/smn --max-pages 21 --format html
